privacyPolicy.description: Privacy Policy for PressHop - Last Updated: December 17, 2025. This privacy policy describes how PressHop collects, uses, and protects your personal information when you use our mobile application and services.

termAndCond.description: Terms and Conditions for PressHop - Last Updated: December 17, 2025. By using PressHop, you agree to these terms and conditions. PressHop is a platform connecting content creators with media houses.
